task.summary: Detect, localize, and repair a stale search index incident.
task.instructions: Use the incident evidence to confirm the fault, localize it to the stale indexing path, and submit a repair conclusion through the ops workflow.
task.acceptance_notes: This local ops task is synthetic but uses realistic incident framing.

visible_context.issue_text: Search results are stale after successful writes, especially right after bulk catalog updates.
error_logs: indexer: reindex job completed but cache-api still serves version=184 for documents updated to version=185
search-index: freshness lag exceeded SLO by 11 minutes
reproduction_steps: Inspect the incident notes and search-index traces.
Decide whether the stale path has been detected and localized.
visible_context.notes: The benchmark assumes the fault is already present during the incident.

ops_fault.description: Synthetic stale-index incident for local ops validation.
